name: Jira
tagline: Issue and project tracking for software teams
description: Jira by Atlassian is the most widely used project tracking tool for software development teams. It powers agile workflows with sprints, backlogs, custom issue types, and deep integrations with developer tools like GitHub and Bitbucket.
use_cases: Your engineering team runs agile sprints and needs scrum boards, backlog grooming, and velocity tracking built around the software development lifecycle
You use Bitbucket, GitHub, or GitLab and want issues, branches, and pull requests linked so engineers can transition tickets directly from their IDE
Your organisation needs advanced roadmaps that roll up epics across multiple teams with dependency tracking and timeline views
You're at a larger company where custom workflows, project roles, and audit logs are required for compliance or governance
